placement.recommended_position: after the existing small homepage service banners, near the consultation/exam/gallery cards
placement.reason: same visual family and direct trust route to the canonical reviews page

copy_rules: Do not claim unverified rating or review count in the homepage banner.
Do not mirror full Yandex review texts in the banner.
Keep /otzivi as the canonical reviews page instead of creating a duplicate page.
verification_gate: rendered homepage shows the banner without text overflow on desktop and mobile
CTA and right-side media panel link to /otzivi
public text contains no internal technical wording
